title: Create DEPENDENCIES.md listing all deps with install instructions
close_reason: Implemented in commit 9e5f4a7: DEPENDENCIES.md lists Rust crates, Python packages (server + scripts), Node packages, system toolchains, Docker build, and minimum agent setup

title: SA-001: Fix stored XSS in ideas-tree.ts via innerHTML
close_reason: Fixed in 78b2260: escapeHtml applied to all innerHTML in ideas-tree.ts

title: SA-004: Replace hardcoded default admin key with env var requirement
close_reason: Fixed in 78b2260: admin key now from ADMIN_KEY env var

title: SA-005: Require authenticated agent credentials on all agent-scoped routes
description: Issue a server-generated agent credential at registration and require it on heartbeat, state, iteration, experiment, hypothesis, and message routes. Reject calls where the credential does not match the claimed agent_id.
close_reason: Fixed in 35184ce: agent_token issued at registration, required on write routes

title: Epic: Fix 4 HIGH severity security vulnerabilities from audit
Epic: Fix swarm identity, access control, and disclosure vulnerabilities from audit
description: Tracks the critical trust-boundary remediation work from the 2026-04-18 security audit: agent authentication, server-side identity enforcement, private-data exposure, and admin/web access controls.
close_reason: All sub-issues resolved in 35184ce + 5fbc540 (SA-007 accepted as public-by-design)

title: Add server-side input validation to Pydantic models for HTML stripping
close_reason: Fixed in 78b2260: Pydantic field_validator strips HTML tags

title: SA-006: Enable SQLite foreign keys and reject orphan writes for unknown agents
description: Enable PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON on every SQLite connection, validate agent existence before writes, and hard-fail requests that would create orphan experiment, hypothesis, or message rows.
close_reason: Fixed in 35184ce: PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON on every conn, FK on messages/best_history, 400 on unknown agent_id

title: SA-009: Add payload size limits and clamp unbounded list endpoints
description: Add field-length limits for title, description, notes, content, and algorithm_code; validate route_data size/shape; clamp message/history list limits; and enforce request-body size boundaries at the app or proxy layer.
close_reason: Fixed in 35184ce: max_length on all string fields, list endpoints clamped

title: SA-007: Restrict solver-code and swarm-history APIs to authorized clients
description: Separate public dashboard data from private swarm data. Remove unauthenticated access to best_algorithm_code, inspiration_code, diversity/source endpoints, agent histories, messages, and dashboard WebSocket streams unless explicitly intended to be public.
close_reason: Won't fix for demo in 5fbc540 — public visibility is the feature. See docs/security-decisions.md; reopen if codebase is reused for non-public deployment

title: Epic: Harden request limits and dependency exposure from audit
description: Tracks the operational hardening items from the 2026-04-18 security audit: payload size limits, endpoint caps, and dependency upgrades identified by pip-audit and cargo-audit.

title: SA-008: Restrict CORS and harden admin endpoint exposure
description: Replace wildcard CORS with an allowlist of trusted origins and ensure admin-only routes are not broadly callable cross-origin. Review the admin surface together with the existing admin-key remediation work.
close_reason: Fixed in 35184ce: CORS_ORIGINS env var, defaults to dashboard URL, methods restricted to GET/POST

title: SA-011: Refresh Rust dependency advisories and rerun cargo audit
description: Address the advisory posture for paste and rand, or document accepted risk if replacement is deferred. Rerun cargo audit after the dependency refresh.
close_reason: Fixed in 35184ce: accepted risk documented in docs/cargo-audit-notes.md — paste/rand are transitive from tig-challenges

title: Research VRPTW literature and suggest solver improvements (tsr)
Install project dependencies (Rust, Python server, Node dashboard)

Added no-Docker rule to CLAUDE.md per user directive, removed Docker section from DEPENDENCIES.md, synced fastapi version (0.136.0).

close_reason: Fixed in 78b2260: escapeHtml applied to all innerHTML in feed.ts
